channel.title: Currency Conversion on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Currency Conversion on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: Stop Paying ₹1.5/USD! Cut Forex Markup When Funding IBKR (India Guide)
item.description: How to avoid high forex markups (₹1.5/USD) when funding your Interactive Brokers (IBKR) account from India. Step-by-step guide to save on currency conversion costs.
